Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the third floor lounge.[n]Koromaru's looking this way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Speaking of, career counseling is coming up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Yeah. What are we even supposed to talk about the whole time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}You're gonna get sick if you go sleeping anywhere you want, you know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}There's a miniature camera near the ceiling. It's been camouflaged.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 2 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}So it's been recording everyone who walks past here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Oh, yeah... I forgot you can see anywhere in the dorm from the command room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Does that mean one has been placed in each of our rooms as well?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}But... I think it might. I did use the system last year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}W-Well, you need a key to use it, and I doubt any of the guys would have the guts to look in our rooms.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 2 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}If they did, Nyx can wait. I'll tear them apart first![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Are you experiencing the psychological breakdown known as "dying of shame"?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 2 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}A-Anyway, we don't need that stupid system anymore! Let's ask Mitsuru-senpai to have it removed![n]{f 1 1}
